scripts.test:flows: node ./tests/flows/validate.cjs && node ./tests/flows/coverage.cjs && npx playwright test tests/playwright/flow-runner.spec.ts
scripts.test:flows:android:contract: SDK_ROOT="${ANDROID_HOME:-${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT:-$HOME/android-sdk}}"; export ANDROID_HOME="$SDK_ROOT" ANDROID_SDK_ROOT="$SDK_ROOT" PATH="$SDK_ROOT/platform-tools:$SDK_ROOT/emulator:$PATH"; node ./scripts/sync-native-flow-fixtures.mjs --check && gradle -p platforms/android app:testDebugUnitTest && gradle -p platforms/android/flow-contracts test
scripts.test:flows:native:contract: npm run test:flows:ios:contract && npm run test:flows:android:contract
